case_title: CARS DAWYDIAK, INC. VS. DAX CRAVEN

docket_entries.description: SUBPOENA RETURNED AND FILED - ISSUED SEP-23-2015 FOR: FIRST REPUBLIC BANK ATTN: LEGAL DEPARTMENT
SMALL CLAIMS HEARING OF NOV-04-2015 - JUDGMENT.
RETURN MAIL - NOTICE OF ENTRY OF JUDGMENT / SENT TO DEFENDANT - UNABLE TO FORWARD
DECLARATION OF APPEARANCE ON BEHALF OF CORPORATION PURSUANT TO CCP 116.540 (B)-(H) FILED BY PLAINTIFF CARS DAWYDIAK, INC.

THE COURT HAS ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF CARS DAWYDIAK, INC. RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT CRAVEN, DAX $5,000.00 PRINCIPAL, $90.00 COSTS, TOTAL JUDGMENT $5,090.00 STAY OF EXECUTION 30 DAYS NO EXHIBITS FILED

DECLARATION OF APPEARANCE ON BEHALF OF CORPORATION PURSUANT TO CCP 116.540 (B)-(H) FILED BY PLAINTIFF CARS DAWYDIAK, INC.

ORDER RE: CONTINUED FOR PROOF OF SERVICE TO AUG-7-2017 AT 11:00AM IN DEPT 506

THE ORDER OF EXAMINATION IS DISCHARGED AS TO DEFENDANT, THE JUDGMENT IS SATISFIED. PURSUANT TO THE AUG-07-17 COURT ORDER IF NEITHER PARTY APPEARS THE MATTER WILL BE DISCHARGED AS SATISFIED. PLAINTIFF TO FILE A SATISFACTION OF JUDGMENT. JUDGMENT CREDITOR CARS DAWYOIAK, INC. IS NOT PRESENT. UDGMENT DEBTOR DAX CRAVEN IS NOT PRESENT. NO EXHIBITS RETAINED. JUDGE: DONALD S. MITCHELL; CLERK: J. MURPHY; NOT REPORTED. (506)
SUBPOENA DUCES TECUM ISSUED TO FIRST REPUBLIC BANK;ATTN:LEGAL DEPT.
PROOF OF SERVICE FILED ON CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF SERVED SEP-30-2015, COURT CERTIFIED MAIL RETURNED SERVED AS TO DEFENDANT CRAVEN, DAX
SUBPOENAED DOCUMENT RECEIVED (SUBPOENA ISSUED - SEP-23-15 TO:FIRST REPUBLIC BANK)
DECLARATION OF APPEARANCE ON BEHALF OF CORPORATION PURSUANT TO CCP 116.540 (B)-(H) FILED BY PLAINTIFF CARS DAWYDIAK, INC.
MONEY CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF FOR $5,048.57 FILED BY CARS DAWYDIAK, INC. AS TO DEFENDANT CRAVEN, DAX ORDER SETTING TRIAL ISSUED FOR NOV-04-2015 AT 03:30 PM IN DEPT 506

SMALL CLAIMS CALENDAR OF NOV-04-2015 - TAKEN UNDER SUBMISSION AS OF NOV-04-2015 BY DONALD S. MITCHELL. PLAINTIFF WAS PRESENT. DEFENDANT WAS PRESENT. PLAINTIFF WAS REPRESENTED BY WALTER DAWYDIAK--PRESIDENT. NO EXHIBITS RETAINED. JUDGE: DONALD S. MITCHELL. CLERK: P. NATT. NOT REPORTED. (506)
ORDER OF EXAMINATION RESET AS TO DEFENDANT CRAVEN, DAX HEARING SET FOR JUN-02-2016 AT 11:00 AM IN DEPT 506

SMALL CLAIMS OEX CALENDAR OF JUL-07-2016 IS CONTINUED PER REQUEST OF PLAINTIFF TO DEC-08-2016 AT 11:00 AM IN DEPT. 506 FOR PROGRESS REPORT. APPEARANCE BY PLAINTIFF'S REPRESENTATIVE, JOHN L. BLOCH. NO APPEARANCE BY DEFENDANT DAX CRAVEN. PROOF OF SERVICE IN THE FILE. JUDGE: DONALD S. MITCHELL. CLERK: K. DOUGHERTY. NOT REPORTED. (D506).

SMALL CLAIMS OEX CALENDAR OF DEC-08-2016 IS CONTINUED FOR PROGRESS REPORT TO APR-10-2017 AT 11:00 AM IN DEPT. 506. APPEARANCE BY JUDGMENT CREDITOR CARS DAWYOIAK, INC'S REPRESENTATIVE JOHN BLOCH. APPEARANCE BY JUDGMENT DEBTOR DAX CRAVEN. CREDITOR RECEIVED A CHECK IN THE AMOUNT OF $500.00 FROM DEBTOR IN COURT TODAY. DEBTOR AGREES TO PAY $500.00 TO THE CREDITOR ON THE 6TH DAY OF EACH MONTH STARTING JANUARY 2017. JUDGE: DONALD S. MITCHELL. CLERK: S. LE. NOT REPORTED. (506)

ORDER CONTINUED TO APRIL 10, 2017 AT 11:00 FOR PROGRESS REPORT/CONTINUED OEX. JUDGMENT DEBTOR PAYS JUDGMENT CREDITOR $500.00 IN COURT TODAY AND PROMISES TO PAY $500.00/MONTH BY THE SIXTH DAY. (SEE SCANNED DOCUMENT)
ORDER RE: ORDER OF EXAMINATION. OFF CALENDAR. NO APPEARANCE BY JUDGMENT CREDITOR (SEE SCANNED DOCUMENT FOR DETAILS)

SMALL CLAIMS OEX CALENDAR OF AUG-07-2017 IS CONTINUED FOR PROGRESS REPORT PARTIES TO SEP-07-2017 AT 11:00 AM IN DEPT. 506. JUDGMENT CREDITOR REPORTS THAT THE JUDGMENT DEBTOR GAVE HIM A CHECK FOR THE FULL AMOUNT DUE. THE MATTER IS CONTIUNED FOR THE CHECK TO CLEAR. NO APPEARANCES ARE REQUIRED IF THE CHECK CLEARS. JUDGMENT CREDITOR CARS DAWYOIAK, INC. IS PRESENT. REPRESENTED BY JOHN BLOCH, CFO. JUDGMENT DEBTOR DAX CRAVEN IS PRESENT. NO EXHIBITS RETAINED. JUDGE: DONALD S. MITCHELL; CLERK: J. MURPHY; NOT REPORTED. (506)
ORDER RE: ORDER OF EXAMINATION CONTINUED FOR PROGRESS REPORT (SEE SCANNED DOCUMENT FOR DETAILS)
